subject: Science

sourceMaterials.title: NCERT ePathshala: Curiosity, Chapter 6 — Materials Around Us
themes: materials can be observed and grouped by shared properties
everyday observation supports comparison and classification

requiredVocabulary.meaning: the substance an object is made from
a feature we can observe or test

localContextNotes: Use safe no-purchase objects such as paper, cloth, a wooden pencil, or a metal spoon.
Make the Science flavor an observation-led household investigation without ingestion, heat, electricity, sharp tools, or breakable glass.
Invite the learner to describe evidence before naming a category.
originalityRequirements: Use the source only to bound scope; write every spoken example and question originally.
Do not reproduce textbook activities, prose, character names, or question wording.

scopeNotes: Checked the official NCERT chapter scope for objects, materials, observable properties, and classification; excluded unrelated chapter facts and unsafe activities.
